models.DashboardKpi: A key performance indicator card showing a label, numeric value, optional trend, and the navigation target when clicked.
models.GoalAlignmentSummary: Aggregate counts of people who are on-goal vs off-goal based on task-to-goal comparison.
models.AttentionPerson: A person flagged as off-goal, showing their name, role, goal alignment status, and the primary misaligned goal.
models.ActivityEvent: A recent system event such as task creation, processing completion, or identity resolution.

relationships: DashboardKpi links to a section route with an optional filter query
AttentionPerson references a User by personId
ActivityEvent may reference a section route for navigation
